pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh script which downloads the TCI.tif file to this exact path.
Confirmed via task description and export_result.sh parsing logic.
Confirmed via task description and export_result.sh parsing logic.
Downloaded the target Sentinel-2 TCI.tif from S3 and inspected it using rasterio. The color interpretation explicitly maps Band 1 to Red, Band 2 to Green, and Band 3 to Blue.
Confirmed via the explicit task instructions and the evaluation logic in verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real Sentinel-2 Level-2A True Color Image (TCI) data downloaded from an AWS S3 bucket. Independent analysis of the TCI.tif file using rasterio confirms that the image contains 3 bands, with Band 1 assigned to Red, Band 2 to Green, and Band 3 to Blue, validating the band_mapping metadata. The paths for the input data, expected DIMAP output, and ENVI export header were verified against setup scripts and task descriptions. The threshold parameters for VARI (>0.15) and NGRDI (>0.05) are explicitly verified by the verifier logic.
